home.heroLine: We bring surfaces back to their original state. Across all of Lithuania.
home.heroMeta: Vilnius, Kaunas, Klaipėda. All of Lithuania.
home.promise: Professional high-pressure cleaning of paver driveways, facades, terraces, roofs and commercial forecourts. No middlemen, no hidden fees, results guaranteed.
home.servicesLede: Eight specialised services for a single surface or an entire site.
home.processLede: Four steps from the first call to a clean paver.
home.coverageLede: Free travel inside Vilnius, Kaunas and Klaipėda. Other regions on agreement.
home.calcTeaserTitle: What will it cost for your site?
home.calcTeaserBody: Enter the area and the service to get a preliminary price in seconds.
home.bookingStripTitle: Let's start with a quick call
home.bookingStripBody: A 15-minute video call or an on-site visit. After it you get a precise written quote within 24 hours.

services.title: Services
services.lede: Eight specialised services. From a single paver to an entire industrial floor.

paverCleaning.title: Driveway and paver cleaning
paverCleaning.lede: We deep-clean paver driveways with professional high-pressure equipment. Moss, weeds in joints, ingrained oil, fuel and rust stains, gone, without damaging the surface.
included: Up to 250 bar pressure with professional equipment
Hot water up to 80°C for stubborn contamination
Joint clearing — moss and weeds removed
Wastewater collection. We leave the site clean.
No travel fee within 30 km of Vilnius, Kaunas or Klaipėda

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We come, assess contamination, agree a final written price.

process.title: Prep
process.body: We tape off the area, protect plants and the facade from spray.

process.title: Wash
process.body: Top-down, in 4–6 m² sectors. We revisit problem spots with a concentrated nozzle.

process.title: Finish
process.body: We collect runoff, refill joints if you chose that add-on, and send before-and-after photos.

contraindications: We will not clean crumbling or loose pavers. We will recommend a re-lay first.
We never use chlorine, for the environment and surrounding plants.

faq.q: Won't you wash sand out of the joints?
faq.a: We adjust pressure for the paver's age and type. After cleaning we recommend refilling joints with quartz sand or granite chippings, available as an add-on.
Typically 3–5 hours depending on soiling. Heavily moss-covered driveways can take up to 8 hours.
No, we bring our own. We can hook up to yours instead, that drops the price by €0.10/m².
April through October, above +5°C. In winter we work only with hot water at temperatures around 0°C.

terraceCleaning.title: Terrace cleaning
terraceCleaning.lede: We refresh wood, composite and stone terraces. Moss, the grey wood layer, BBQ grease, all removed. After cleaning the surface is ready for oiling or sealing.
included: Pressure tuned for each surface — wood, composite, stone
Removal of the grey wood layer
Plant and facade protection from spray

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We inspect the wood for rot or loose boards. We confirm the final price.

process.title: Prep
process.body: We cover furniture and plants and check the joints.

process.title: Wash
process.body: We use a rotary nozzle, with pressure matched to the wood's hardness.

process.title: Finish
process.body: Surface dried, ready for oiling. If you chose, we seal it on the spot.

contraindications: We will not clean rotten wood. We will recommend replacing damaged boards first.
Lacquered terraces are washed at low pressure to preserve the lacquer.

faq.a: We use a flat or rotary nozzle, with pressure matched to the wood. We never aim a concentrated jet close to the boards.

faq.q: Do I need to oil after cleaning?
faq.a: We recommend it, especially outdoors. We can seal with clear or coloured impregnant on the same visit.

facadeCleaning.title: Facade cleaning
facadeCleaning.lede: We clean rendered, clinker, concrete and timber facades. Moss, algae, bird traces and pollution removed without damage.
included: Professional lifts or certified rope access for height work
Warm water for algae and moss
Window and frame protection from cleaning agents

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We assess the facade condition, render quality, access options.

process.title: Prep
process.body: We tape off the area, protect windows, doors and plants.

process.title: Wash
process.body: Top-down, in sectors. Heavy growth gets a biocide pre-treatment.

process.title: Finish
process.body: We clean surrounding areas and hand over photos.

contraindications: We only clean structurally sound facades. Crumbling render is repaired first.
Heat-reflective paint layers are washed at low pressure only.

faq.a: Up to 6 floors with our telescopic lances. Higher buildings via lifts or certified rope access.
Post-wash biocide treatment typically keeps surfaces clear for 3–5 years.

roofCleaning.title: Roof cleaning
roofCleaning.lede: Safe cleaning of tile, metal and bitumen roofs. We remove moss, lichen and pollution, extending the lifetime of the roof covering.
included: Specialised pressure for each roof material

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We inspect the roof from the ground and, if needed, from scaffolding.

process.title: Prep
process.body: Harnesses, ropes, ground barriers around the building.

process.title: Wash
process.body: We work from ridge down, without overloading tiles.

process.title: Finish
process.body: Gutter clearance and biocide treatment.

contraindications: We do not work in rain or strong wind.
Visibly damaged tiles are repaired before washing.

faq.q: Will the roof leak after washing?
faq.a: We use matched pressure, tiles do not shift. After the work we check the ridge and gutters.

fenceCleaning.title: Fence cleaning
fenceCleaning.lede: We clean wood, metal, concrete and plastic fences. After cleaning the surface is ready for paint or impregnation.

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We inspect the fence and agree the pressure regime.

process.title: Prep
process.body: We cover adjacent plants.

process.title: Wash
process.body: Both sides, with extra attention to the bottom half-metre.

process.title: Finish
process.body: Rust spots treated if you chose the add-on.

contraindications: Crumbling wood: we will recommend replacing planks first.
Heavily rusted metal must be replaced, not just washed.

faq.a: Yes. After cleaning we let the surface dry; we can return the next day to paint if you wish.

oilStainRemoval.title: Oil stain removal
oilStainRemoval.lede: We remove oil, fuel, hydraulic and coolant stains from concrete, asphalt and pavers using hot water and grease emulsifiers.
included: Repeat treatment until result is acceptable

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We assess stain age and depth and agree a realistic outcome.

process.title: Prep
process.body: We tape off and prepare runoff capture.

process.title: Clean
process.body: Apply emulsifier, dwell, then rinse with hot water.

process.title: Finish
process.body: Surface dried, result reviewed, repeat if needed.

contraindications: Decade-old deep stains may not fully disappear. We say so up front.
We avoid aggressive chemicals on porous stone.

faq.a: Usually 70–90% of it. Total removal depends on the surface porosity and how deeply it soaked in.

commercialForecourt.title: Commercial forecourt cleaning
commercialForecourt.lede: We clean petrol stations, restaurant terraces, retail entrances and other commercial spaces overnight or early morning so we don't disrupt your operations.

process.title: Assessment
process.body: We visit the site and agree timings and shifts.

process.title: Prep
process.body: Barriers and signage in place.

process.title: Wash
process.body: Fast, high-throughput equipment.

process.title: Finish
process.body: Surface dry and ready for the morning's first customer.

contraindications: Failed safety requirements may delay work.
We work only with written permission from the site owner.

faq.a: Yes, that is most clients' choice. We start at 22:00 and finish by 06:00.

faq.q: Do you need our water or power?
faq.a: We bring our own water tank. Machines are fuel-driven, no power needed.

industrialFloor.title: Industrial floor cleaning
industrialFloor.lede: We clean industrial concrete, epoxy and resin floors in warehouses, factories and hangars. Recurring service plans available.

process.title: Assessment
process.body: Site visit, schedule, frequency, hazardous zones.

process.title: Prep
process.body: Coordination with on-site staff, area cordoning.

process.title: Clean
process.body: Scrubber across open floor, manual work in problem zones.

process.title: Finish
process.body: Wastewater collected, report delivered.

contraindications: Damaged epoxy: we recommend recoating before regular cleaning.
Sites with sensitive goods: written agreement required.

faq.a: Yes — typically monthly or quarterly. We sign annual contracts at fixed prices.

calculator.title: Calculator
calculator.lede: Enter area and service for a preliminary price in seconds. A precise written quote follows the on-site visit.

summary.title: Preliminary estimate
summary.note: Final price confirmed after the on-site visit.

estimate.title: Email me the estimate
estimate.name: Name
estimate.sentTitle: Thank you, the estimate is on its way
estimate.sentBody: Check your inbox in a few minutes.

work.title: Work
work.lede: Real photos, real customers, real results.
work.empty: No work in this category yet.

about.title: About
about.lede: An independent crew working in high-pressure cleaning since {{YEAR_FOUNDED}}. We do the work ourselves, no subcontractors. We send the photos ourselves. We write the quotes ourselves. We sign the warranty ourselves.
about.story: We started with a single machine in our neighbour's yard. Today we work across Lithuania with three crews and specialised equipment for every surface. The principle is the same: if a surface can look perfect, we make it look perfect.
about.equipmentLede: Professional Karcher and Nilfisk machines. Up to 250 bar, water up to 90°C. Separate equipment for sensitive surfaces (wood, clinker).
about.certificationsLede: Public liability cover up to €{{INSURANCE_AMOUNT}}. Rope-access certifications. All staff on permanent employment contracts.
about.ctaBody: A short video call and we will already know what your site looks like clean.

contact.title: Contact
contact.lede: Call, write or book a visit. We respond within hours.

form.name: Name
form.sentBody: We'll be in touch within working hours.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.lede: Answers to the questions we hear every day.

whatSurfaces.a: Pavers, concrete, asphalt, clinker, stone tiles, wood terraces, rendered and clinker facades, tile and metal roofs, fences. If unsure, send a photo and we will reply within hours.

winterWork.a: Yes, with hot water at 0°C and above. Below freezing we only work specific indoor sites.

ownWater.a: No, we bring our own. We can hook up to yours, which drops the price by €0.10/m².

chemicals.a: Only biodegradable, EU-certified products. No chlorine, no aggressive acids.

smallJobs.a: Yes. Minimum order is €60. For small jobs we can stop by on the way to another site.

minimumOrder.a: It depends on the service. Fence cleaning starts at €60, paver cleaning €80, facades €200, industrial floors €600.

writtenQuote.q: Will I get a written quote?
writtenQuote.a: Always. After an on-site visit or based on photos you send. Each line item is shown separately.

vatHandling.a: Yes. All prices are shown both with and without VAT.

travelFees.a: Free within 30 km of Vilnius, Kaunas or Klaipėda. Beyond that, €0.50 per km from base.

addonPricing.a: Joint refilling with quartz sand from €0.60/m². Clear impregnation from €2.00/m². All prices visible in the calculator.

howLong.q: How long does the work take?
howLong.a: 100 m² of pavers: 3–5 hours. 200 m² of facade: a single day. Industrial sites: per schedule.

weatherDelay.a: Light rain doesn't stop us. Heavy rain we reschedule at no extra charge.

presenceRequired.q: Do I need to be on site?
presenceRequired.a: Only at the start to show the zones. After that you can leave; we send photos.

noiseLevels.a: About 75 dB at 5 m, similar to a lawnmower. For apartment buildings we coordinate with neighbours in advance.

wastewater.a: Into specialised containers or to drainage per regulations. We do not pollute the environment.

paymentMethods.a: Bank transfer against an invoice. Private clients can pay in cash after the work is done.

invoiceTimeline.q: When will I get the invoice?
invoiceTimeline.a: We issue the invoice at the end of the work or by email the next working day.

deposit.a: Standard work, no. For projects over €2000 we ask for a 30% deposit before starting.

vatInvoice.q: Can I get a VAT invoice?
vatInvoice.a: Yes, with all required details. We can deliver it via your e-invoicing system.

businessClients.a: Yes. Most commercial and industrial work is with legal entities. We sign annual contracts.

qualityGuarantee.a: Yes. If the result misses the agreed standard, we return and fix it at no extra charge.

insurance.a: Public liability cover up to €{{INSURANCE_AMOUNT}}. Damage is covered.

damagedTile.q: What if you damage a paver?
damagedTile.a: We replace it at our cost. Rare, because we assess the pavers before starting.

regrowthMoss.q: When will the moss come back?
regrowthMoss.a: With biocide treatment, typically 3–5 years. Without it, 1–2 years depending on the surroundings.

complaints.a: Contact us within 14 days of the work. We'll come back free of charge to assess and, if it's our fault, fix it.

assess.title: Assessment
assess.body: We come, assess contamination and agree a written final price.

prep.title: Prep
prep.body: We tape off, protect plants, facades and windows.

wash.title: Wash
wash.body: Top-down, with pressure tuned to the surface's sensitivity.

finish.title: Finish
finish.body: We collect runoff, photograph results and deliver a report.
